query:
UPDATE release_notes SET title = 'Community Care: app polish', summary = 'A short acknowledgement for the latest navigation and leaderboard polish.', body = 'Small app polish is live: you can now swipe between sections, boost tokens are tucked away until tapped, and the mobile top three is easier to read. Tap below so everyone knows this update was seen.', versionLabel = 'Care polish 2026-05-10', category = 'community_care', active = 1, updatedAt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = 30001;
INSERT INTO release_notes (title, summary, body, versionLabel, category, active, publishedAt, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES ('Community Care: Proof page edits', 'A separate acknowledgement for the Proof page changes.', 'Proof has been cleaned up: media is easier to browse, reactions and comments are live, and Deep Thought now shows the right interpretation. Tap below to confirm you have seen the Proof update.', 'Proof edits 2026-05-10', 'community_care', 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
command:

Tap below so everyone knows this update was seen.', versionLabel = 'Care polish 2026-05-10', category = 'community_care', active = 1, updatedAt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = 30001;
